title: woodsia dubia
intro: Woodsia dubia, also known as the Indian cliff brake, is a type of fern native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and digestive issues. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and acting as an antidote for snake bites. In herbal preparations, Woodsia dubia is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
